reviews.review_msg: I had a really tough time in EDUC 401 as I did not get the support I needed to succeed. Wendi was always placing the onus on me to do anything extra and always did the bare minimum. She took course questions as program criticisms, and was very difficult to talk to. Overall, my experience with her as my FA has been negative, and I regret taking PDP.

Wendi was not helpful when I got placed with a bad supervising teacher. I went through 6 weeks of difficulty without any support. She told me to practice being responsive, and that I did not take feedback well; it was only after I went above her and complained that something was done. More interested in her research than her students' well-being.

Wendi was my FA for 401, and when I had issues with my teacher at my school, she was very condescending and acted like I was the problem. Only when I got outside help did she soften her approach and pretend to be supportive. I will never forget her trying to blame me for the issues my teacher caused in my class. If you get her as your FA, be wary.

Wendi is not pleasant to talk to and has a tendency to talk down to people when they ask her questions. My EDUC 401 class had her as the co-teacher, and I dreaded asking her questions as she refused any effort to make the program more accessible. She always acted like my needs were a chore and did bare minimum. Overly obsessed with her research.
Nice person, terrible educator. Disorganized, vague, I learned nothing. This semester was a waste of time and money
